replaced_requirements: LaTeX source is canonical paper state
ext research templates creates new canonical templates
Markdown publication input is rejected instead of represented as a derived view
create-paper-template writes a canonical LaTeX tree under intent/derived/writing-template
superseded_incomplete_tests: add-kaoju-paper-writing tasks 5.1 through 5.8 when they assert a LaTeX-first canonical source or reject the MyST-derived publication path
retained_behavior: immutable build attempts and exact build provenance
publication Gate and no implicit external publication
supersession.legacy_posture: Historical LaTeX-first records remain readable. They are never promoted to canonical MyST without an actor-authorized intake with explicit provenance.

myst_parser.purpose: Structural MyST parsing, validation diagnostics, and TeX initialization.

wiki_viewer.review_result: The available migration copy names its source path but contains no LICENSE, COPYING, NOTICE, license field, repository remote, or commit identity sufficient for redistribution.
wiki_viewer.prohibition: Do not copy, import, load, or invoke candidate viewer or external imsight-llm-wiki skill code.
wiki_viewer.implementation: Package an independently written static viewer that reads the documented Kaoju wiki JSON manifest.

binding_queries.describe: isomer-cli --print-json ext kaoju bindings describe KAOJU:WHAT
